related to water, sea travel etc.) and be endowed with wife, ornaments, robes and happiness.
18-21. EFFECTS OF BIRTH IN LEO ASCENDANT.
One born in this Ascendant will be fond of eating meat, will earn wealth and honour through the
king, be bereft of religion, be dutiful in family affairs, will have a face, resembling that of a lion,
will hold a high rank of office, be majestic, strong, bold, will speak sparingly, be a miser, will
trouble others, be desirous of (eating or) worldly enjoyments, will wander in hills and forests,
be irascible, be firm in friendship, be careless, inaccessible (or inviolable), will destroy his
enemies, will have famous sons, will honour the virtuous, be rich through agriculture etc.,
interested in business and will spend heavily on prostitutes, dancers and his own wife and will
suffer dental diseases.
22-25. EFFECTS OF BIRTH IN VIRGO ASCENDANT.
